Package org.eventb.core.seqprover

Interface IParameterizerDescriptor

All Known Implementing Classes:
Placeholders.ParameterizerPlaceholder, TacticDescriptors.ParameterizerDescriptor
public interface IParameterizerDescriptor
Common protocol for parameterizer descriptors.

Parameterizers are contributed by providing tactic parameters to auto tactic extensions.

Since:
2.3

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ITacticDescriptor
    getTacticDescriptor()
    Returns the descriptor of this parameterizer, viewed as a tactic.
    IParamTacticDescriptor
    instantiate(String id, String name, String description, IParameterValuation valuation)
    Returns a descriptor for the tactic obtained by instantiating this parameterizer with the given parameters .
    IParamTacticDescriptor
    instantiate(IParameterValuation valuation, String id)
    Returns a descriptor for the tactic obtained by instantiating this parameterizer with the given parameters .
    IParameterSetting
    makeParameterSetting()
    Returns a parameter setting initialized with default parameter values.

  • Method Details

    • getTacticDescriptor

      ITacticDescriptor getTacticDescriptor()
      Returns the descriptor of this parameterizer, viewed as a tactic.

      Returned descriptor can NOT be instantiated. Any attempt to call ITacticDescriptor.getTacticInstance() on returned object will throw an UnsupportedOperationException. Call instantiate(IParameterValuation, String) instead.

      Returns:
      a tactic descriptor
      Since:
      3.0

    • makeParameterSetting

      IParameterSetting makeParameterSetting()
      Returns a parameter setting initialized with default parameter values.
      Returns:
      a parameter setting
      Since:
      2.3

    • instantiate

      IParamTacticDescriptor instantiate(IParameterValuation valuation, String id) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Returns a descriptor for the tactic obtained by instantiating this parameterizer with the given parameters .

      A parameter valuation can be customized by makeParameterSetting().

      This is a convenience method fully equivalent to calling instantiate(id, null, null, valuation).

      Parameters:
      valuation - a parameter valuation
      id - the id of the resulting tactic
      Returns:
      a tactic
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - in case there is a problem instantiating the tactic (the class given in the extension point cannot be loaded or does not implement the right interface)
      IllegalArgumentException
      Since:
      2.3

    • instantiate

      IParamTacticDescriptor instantiate(String id, String name, String description, IParameterValuation valuation)
      Returns a descriptor for the tactic obtained by instantiating this parameterizer with the given parameters .

      A parameter valuation can be customized by makeParameterSetting().

      Parameters:
      id - the id of the resulting tactic
      name - the name of the resulting tactic. May be null, in which case the name of this parameterizer will be used
      description - the id description of the resulting tactic. May be null, in which case the description of this parameterizer will be used
      valuation - a parameter valuation
      Returns:
      a new tactic with the given id
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - in case there is a problem instantiating the tactic (the class given in the extension point cannot be loaded or does not implement the right interface)
      Since:
      2.5
